text: I am surrounded by the cold clarity of glass, sterile white walls, and the silent promise of development and innovation. The R+D wall, brightly colored and filled with explanatory text and digital displays, draws my attention to humanity’s drive to know, improve, and connect. Yet, the emptiness of the chairs behind glass makes me aware of the tension between collective effort and moments of individual solitude. I feel like an observer on the frontier of human curiosity, invited but separate, expectant and alert to what ideas may emerge here.
